description: An Occupational Health and Safety Technician has been informed that a new electronics assembly line will expose workers to lead-based solder. Per OSHA 29 CFR 1910.1025, biological monitoring is mandatory. Create a laboratory test type named 'OCCUPATIONAL LEAD EXPOSURE PANEL' (code: LEAD_OCC, Active: Yes) with four analytes: Blood Lead Level (code: BLL, range 0-5 µg/dL), Zinc Protoporphyrin (code: ZPP, range 0-35 µg/dL), Free Erythrocyte Protoporphyrin (code: FEP, range 0-70 µg/dL), and Hemoglobin (code: HGB, range 12-17 g/dL). Request this panel for the worker Bonifacio Caput and schedule a follow-up appointment for him 14-30 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
